method: reused live AFA web session, loaded /afa/php/home.php?segment=DEVICES, extracted matching in-page TOKEN, replayed GET_REPORTS with the same PHPSESSID and TOKEN from localhost on the target host
support_stop_point_judgment: This session is no longer top-level GUI down once the same bounded window shows the usable DEVICES shell and a successful GET_REPORTS response. The next troubleshooting branch should narrow on REPORTS content or deeper workflow behavior instead of returning to the first-shell gate.
residual_risk: This evidence reused an already-live authenticated web session rather than proving the same REPORTS branch through a fresh login minute.
